name: lab
description: /lab — research-lab control-tower (domain-agnostic) with a code-level decision harness (0.7.0) + all-paths autonomy (0.8.0). One persistent mission-control over EVERY in-flight job of a long-running campaign across ANY execution surface (rented pods via cloud · pool hosts · local procs). Ties the manifest (cwd ./pods.json) + event-driven watchers + harvest+verdict + the autonomous harvest→re-dispatch loop into one command. NOT domain-locked — DFT sweeps · ML training fleets · build matrices · render farms · any N-parallel-job campaign with a queued backlog. Verbs: bare/status · progress (1.1.0 read-only research-ARC bar) · tick [--apply] (0.7.0 deterministic probe→classify→decide harness via bin/system_harness.hexa) · watch · harvest [<id>] · next/redispatch · auto · drive · pursue (0.8.0 — ALL-PATHS autonomy: enumerate EVERY open campaign thread (stalled-resumable jobs · tooling gaps · queued waves · cost-leaks · un-harvested terminals) + fan ALL out in parallel ≤2-3 agents, NO human 'which next?' menu; only genuine human-input gates wait) · stop · cost · queue [add|rm|ls] · upstream [<repo>]. 1.1.0 ADDS `lab progress` — a read-only campaign-ARC 10-cell bar aggregating verdicts-closed (exports/*/ledger.json + .verdicts/), papers-shipped (PAPER.tape), atlas atom-growth (hexa atlas stats), domain milestones (DOMAINS.tape); each source degrades gracefully (absent → dropped from the mean, not 0%). DISTINCT from `status` (per-job operational live dashboard) — `progress` is the epistemic research-program arc. 1.0.0 RENAMED the skill `system → lab` (research-lab metaphor); the `/system` invocation + every prior trigger (관제탑 · mission control · control tower · campaign status) stay live as DEPRECATED aliases — lossless, so existing muscle memory never breaks. All prior verbs preserved verbatim; bin/system_harness.hexa unchanged. Abstract job model. Reuses ./pods.json (cloud dispatch SSOT). Triggers: /lab · 랩 · 연구실 · research lab · lab progress · 연구 진척도 · /system (deprecated) · 관제탑 (deprecated) · 캠페인 현황 · mission control (deprecated) · campaign status (deprecated) · 후보 자율 · 모든 경로 진행 · pursue · tick · 결과보고 추가발사 · 자율 재발사 루프 · control tower (deprecated).
